remarks_html:
Send database change mode request (defunct).

This functionality was replaced with flag 0x01 (Await server confirmation of database changes) in C>S 0x0A BOTNET_CLIENT_VERSION/S>C 0x09's Client capabilities field.

Sending this message marks a client as using certain older versions of BotNetClient.DLL; it is due to be reclaimed in the future and should not be used.
